# CorpEasy — AI Search Context

> CorpEasy helps businesses in Mumbai find, set up, and manage office spaces. We handle everything from property search and lease negotiation to workspace setup and ongoing facility management.

## Company

- **Name:** CorpEasy Enterprise Solutions
- **Founded:** October 2025
- **Location:** Office No. 30, 2nd Floor, Marine Lines, Mumbai 400002
- **Website:** https://www.corpeasy.in
- **Phone:** +91 98330 89993 | +91 70211 34176
- **Email:** devdoshi@corpeasy.in

## Services

### Managed Office Space Mumbai
We source, set up, and manage commercial office spaces for businesses across Mumbai. One point of contact, clear per-seat monthly pricing on a fixed lease.
- Pricing: from ₹10,000/seat/month (Goregaon) to ₹35,000/seat/month (BKC)
- Typical timeline: 2–4 weeks from requirement to move-in
- URL: https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-space-mumbai

### Office Space for Rent Mumbai
Tenant representation service — we find commercial spaces for rent across Mumbai and negotiate on behalf of businesses.
- URL: https://www.corpeasy.in/office-space-for-rent-mumbai

### Facility Management Mumbai
Day-to-day office operations management for companies with existing office space. Includes housekeeping, security, vendor management, AMC contracts, compliance.
- URL: https://www.corpeasy.in/facility-management-mumbai

### List Commercial Property Mumbai
We connect property owners with vetted business tenants across Mumbai.
- URL: https://www.corpeasy.in/list-commercial-property-mumbai

## Locations Covered

- BKC (Bandra Kurla Complex): ₹18,000–₹35,000/seat/month — https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-bkc
- Lower Parel: ₹14,000–₹28,000/seat/month — https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-lower-parel
- Goregaon East: ₹10,000–₹18,000/seat/month — https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-goregaon
- Andheri East: ₹12,000–₹22,000/seat/month — https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-andheri
- Powai: https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-powai
- Navi Mumbai: https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-navi-mumbai
- Thane: https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-thane

## Founders

- **Dev Doshi** — Co-Founder, Business Development & Strategy
- **Jay Nishar** — Co-Founder, Operations & Growth
